title: DMEPOS suppliers on federal exclusion lists
headline: 0 of 63,988 active DMEPOS suppliers in the CMS Medicare DME, Devices & Supplies by Supplier file (DY 2023) appear on the active OIG LEIE ∪ SAM.gov exclusion list (8,619 excluded NPIs). This is the system working correctly: DMEPOS enrollment screens federally-excluded NPIs at the gate, which is what 42 CFR § 424.530(a)(2) and CMS DMEPOS Supplier Standard 11 require. Worth publishing as a reference point — when other federal program directories (NDH, see H24/H25; state Medicaid spending, see H29) show non-zero exposure, the DMEPOS zero is the comparison baseline.
notes: This is a national finding — DMEPOS supplier directory is itself the population, joined against the active LEIE ∪ SAM NPI set (8619 NPIs). Per-state breakdown chart shows the top 10 states by matched supplier count. VA-state slice at /api/v1/states/va/h33-dmepos-excluded-va.csv (0 rows) for DMAS triage. Full national CSV with all 0 matched suppliers at /api/v1/findings/dmepos-excluded-detail.csv.
